series_metadata.series_description: 1) Alphabetical by County and numerical within Counties. 2) Categories: A) Drill, B) Reopen, C) Reissue, D) Plug Back, E) Plug and Abandon, F) Storage Wells, G) Saltwater Disposal Wells, H) Secondary Recovery.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: Permanent, unless scanned in an electronic format ; Electronic: Permanent
